text: If you kind of bring it back to very business-first principles, if you're providing a product of value, capitalism will find a way to make the supply chain work for you.

text: And his law was that given enough eyes, all bugs are shallow.

speaker: SPEAKER_01

text: So I kind of believe that they bring a very, very different, positive angle to security.
